panels.title: Eurbania
panels.text: A mid-sized European city, like many others. Trams that are almost on time, squares that fill and empty, neighbours who nod without quite knowing each other's names.

panels.title: The Fragmentation
panels.text: Lately something has been pulling the city apart. Not a storm, not a crisis on the news — just distance. People retreating indoors, shared spaces going quiet, decisions made about everyone by fewer and fewer.

panels.title: The Community Center
panels.text: One place still tries to hold the threads together. Its doors are open, its noticeboard is full, and tonight it is busier than usual: the city has called an assembly, and someone has to show up.
Five people could walk through that door. Tonight, one of them is you. Who will you be?
